calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this is on for a petition for letters of administration, that various issues have been raised by the examiner but not addressed, that the petitioner is not present today and took the petition off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Siu. (Not Reported)
